title: La Louvière, Hainaut — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to La Louvière, Hainaut: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

La Louvière is a city in Hainaut with a population of 80,000. A former mining city with UNESCO-listed hydraulic boat lifts, affordable housing, and a rich industrial heritage museum district.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
